message:
fix: make TestRoutingIntegration/maintainer_with_SSH_remote deterministic (bd-g9eu)

Set explicit beads.role=maintainer in git config instead of relying on
the deprecated URL heuristic, which can be flaky when git config rewrites
SSH URLs to HTTPS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
